# orm-admin-org-permissions-get-padded-mask

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the orgPermissionsGetPaddedMask query

## Usage

```typescript
db.query.orgPermissionsGetPaddedMask({ mask: '<value>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

```typescript
const result = await db.query.orgPermissionsGetPaddedMask({ mask: '<value>' }).execute();
```
